heading: Out-of-State vehicles to be exempted from odd-even motor fuel purchase restrictions
label: 8522 Out-of-State vehicles to be exempted from odd-even motor fuel purchase restrictions

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Notwithstanding any provision of any Federal, State, or local law, any odd-even fuel purchase plan in effect in any State may not prohibit the sale of motor fuel to any person for use in a vehicle bearing a license plate issued by any authority other than that State or a State contiguous to that State.

children.heading: “Odd-even fuel purchase plan” defined
children.label: b “Odd-even fuel purchase plan” defined
children.text: For purposes of this section the term “odd-even fuel purchase plan” means any motor fuel sales restriction under which a person may purchase motor fuel for use in any vehicle only on days (or other periods of time) determined on the basis of a number or letter appearing on the license plate of that vehicle (or on any similar basis).
